## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in Kupola.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests.
- [ ] Ran `npm run verify`.
- [ ] Updated public types and documentation when the API changed.
- [ ] Checked package contents or bundle size when the published artifact changed.
- [ ] Kept unrelated component, adapter, and repository-wide lint debt out of this change.

## Compatibility

List browser, Node, API, accessibility, security, or migration implications. Write
`None` when the change has no compatibility impact.
